name: TA West Greenwich
description: Full-service TravelCenters of America (#253) on I-95 near the Route 102 junction, with 24/7 BP diesel, roughly 180 truck parking spaces, 3 service bays, showers, laundry, a driver lounge, and Popeyes/Dunkin. The only full truck stop on Rhode Island's I-95 corridor.

name: CAT Scale at TA West Greenwich
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the TA West Greenwich travel center on I-95, offering guaranteed-accurate axle and gross vehicle weighing.

name: Sullivan Tire Commercial Truck Center
description: Commercial truck tire sales and service center near I-95 in Warwick, offering 24-hour truck road service for fleets and owner-operators.

name: Sterry Street Towing
description: Long-established (35+ years) light- to heavy-duty towing and recovery operator serving the I-95 corridor around Providence and Pawtucket, with 24/7 emergency response.

name: A Towing
description: 24/7 towing and roadside assistance company offering light, medium, and heavy-duty towing and winch-outs across the Warwick, Cranston, and Providence stretch of I-95.

name: Rhode Island I-95 Richmond Weigh/Inspection Station
description: Fixed weigh/commercial-vehicle inspection site on I-95 southbound in Richmond near the Connecticut line, used by Rhode Island State Police Commercial Enforcement for weight and safety inspections.

name: Rhode Island Welcome Center (I-95 North)
address: I-95 North, Hope Valley/Richmond (between Exits 4 and 7)
description: RIDOT welcome center/rest area on I-95 North between Exits 4 and 7 near the Connecticut line, offering restrooms and parking; the main building is under renovation with 24/7 temporary restroom facilities into late 2026.

name: Best Western West Greenwich Inn
description: Hotel just off I-95 Exit 6 in West Greenwich that explicitly provides on-site truck and bus parking, plus covered motorcycle parking.

name: Motel 6 Warwick - Providence Airport
description: Economy hotel directly off I-95 in Warwick near T.F. Green Airport that offers free truck parking able to accommodate trucks, buses, and RVs.

name: New England Tractor Trailer Training School (NETTTS) Rhode Island
description: CDL Class A and B truck driver training school with an on-site training yard, located near I-95/I-295 in Pawtucket serving the Providence area and southern New England.
